title: Sneakie Like 1.8
description:
This mod allows you to get back into that 1.8 sneaking - it's as close as i could make it, and personally I've gotten completely used to this sneak setting (I never would with the newer sneak animation). 

There is some customizability but not a lot.
body:
# Sneakie Like 1.8

Let's try bringing back the classic 1.8 sneaking animation! I've created this mod to try bringing back the good old sneak feeling from 1.8 _(Mostly because my girlfriend disgrace the new sneak animation, and I do everything to make her happy)_. This mod consists of 100% "eyeballed" adjustments, because frankly- I have no clue where to find this information about the game...

## Features:
- **Classic Sneak Animation**: An attempt in returning the same feel as the old 1.8 sneak animation
- **Customization**: While limited, there are still some settings you can tweak as you wish
  - _Please note that there is no limit on the values, you can go **WILD** if you want to_

### Final Note
If you're like me- and you've never gotten used to the newer sneak animation, give it a try! Bugs might occurr, I would very much appreciate if you were to find them so i can try my very best squishing them. This is my first Minecraft mod, and it's a very fun and instructive to fiddle around trying to solve things!
